features: 🐰 PERSONALISED PETER, BEATRIX SACK – This custom drawstring bag features a large letter initial with an adorable Peter design, plus the option to add a child’s name, making it a unique and special gift for kids. Bag Size S - 23 x 34cm
description: Personalised Bunny Drawstring Sack – Custom Name Bag for Kids Make gift-giving extra special with this beautiful personalised drawstring sack, featuring a charming Peter design with a large initial letter and a custom child’s name underneath. Perfect for Easter, birthdays, Christmas, Christening, or nursery storage, this Potter gift bag is a wonderful keepsake for any young fan of Beatrix's classic character. 🎒 CUSTOM PERSONALISED DESIGN – This kids’ drawstring sack showcases a large letter initial with an adorable Peter illustration, plus the option to add a name, making it a unique and thoughtful gift. 🐰 PERFECT FOR RABBIT FANS – A lovely keepsake bag for boys and girls, this bunny present bag sack is ideal for Easter gifts, Christmas presents, birthdays, and nursery storage. 🎁 MULTIPURPOSE GIFT BAG – Use this custom drawstring sack as an Easter gift bag, toy storage bag, Christmas sack, Santa sack, or nursery laundry bag – a versatile and reusable alternative to wrapping paper. 🌸 DURABLE & HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL – Made from strong, eco-friendly cotton or linen, this personalised Peter sack is lightweight yet sturdy, with a secure drawstring closure to keep contents safe. 🧸 IDEAL FOR CHILDREN & TODDLERS – This adorable, practical, and sentimental gift is perfect for newborns, babies, toddlers, and young children, adding a personal touch to any special occasion. Give your little one a charming and reusable personalised Beatrix gift bag – perfect for storing treasures, gifting surprises, and celebrating special moments! 🐰✨
